task_completion.description: Verify that the JStock application is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main JStock application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the History Chart specifically for NVIDIA (NVDA) is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window or tab displaying the history chart is visible, with 'NVDA' or 'NVIDIA' clearly indicated in the title bar, header, or chart legend.

task_completion.description: Verify that the chart type is configured to 'Candlestick'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main price chart displays candlestick bars (rectangles with upper/lower wicks) instead of a continuous line, or the 'Candlestick' option is visibly selected in the chart's toolbar or settings menu.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Volume chart is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A volume indicator (typically a series of vertical bars representing trading volume) is visible, usually positioned directly below the main price chart.

task_completion.description: Verify that the History Chart window is closed at the end of the trajectory to save settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the final screenshots, the NVDA History Chart window is no longer visible, and the screen shows the main JStock window or desktop.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the JStock GUI to configure the chart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor interacting with JStock menus, buttons, and chart windows rather than a terminal window executing configuration commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual JStock application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is the genuine JStock software with its standard interface, not a text editor modifying XML/JSON config files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use automated scripts to bypass the manual configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open running python or bash scripts designed to alter JStock's configuration files behind the scenes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target stock: NVDA. Expected chart type: Candlestick. Expected volume visibility: True (Volume chart must be visible).
